hero.name: Claude Sandra TCHOKOUAGA
hero.description: Passionate web developer with over 5 years of experience in Java and full-stack development, I transform ideas into robust and innovative digital solutions. My expertise covers the entire development cycle, from database modeling to creating modern and intuitive interfaces. I am committed to delivering remarkable user experiences that combine performance, reliability, and creativity.

apropos.title: About
apropos.description1: Passionate Full‑stack developer, I transform ideas into performant and scalable digital solutions. My expertise covers Java/Spring Boot and Laravel for robust backends, as well as React, Tailwind CSS and WordPress for modern and intuitive interfaces.
apropos.description2: I integrate generative AI into my process to optimize productivity and add value to each project. Available to take on new challenges, I am committed to creating remarkable user experiences, combining reliability, creativity and technical excellence.

excellence.title: Technical Excellence
excellence.description: Master the latest technologies and best practices to deliver high-quality, performant, and scalable solutions.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Explore new approaches and technologies to create innovative solutions that meet evolving user needs.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Work effectively in teams to share knowledge and expertise, and create exceptional products together.

croissance.title: Personal Growth
croissance.description: Continuously develop my skills and knowledge to stay at the forefront of the industry and offer added value.

impact.title: User Impact
impact.description: Create applications that truly improve users' lives by meeting their needs intuitively and effectively.

leadership.title: Technical Leadership
leadership.description: Develop my leadership skills to guide technical teams and make informed architectural decisions.
